prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

here's what i need, each one as its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line plz)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

make sense? the copy should be compelling and on-brand

okay thats it. actually do the work, don't just yap about it. write everything to the files

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content:
Headline: Meet Lumina—light that syncs with your workday.

Lumina is the smart desk lamp that automatically shifts color temperature and brightness to match the time of day, your calendar, and the room you’re in. No more fiddling with settings or staring into harsh light—just steady focus from your first email to your last meeting.

Built for remote workers who care about productivity and wellness, Lumina delivers warm mornings, crisp midday clarity, and gentle evening glow to reduce eye strain and help you stay in rhythm.

Plug it in, connect once, and let it do the rest. It just works.

Email 1: Announcement
Subject: Introducing Lumina—light that adapts to your workday

Hi there,

Meet Lumina, the smart desk lamp designed for remote work. It automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar, and your room’s ambient light—so you can stay focused without touching a single setting.

No more harsh glare. No more guessing. Just light that works with you, from your first call to your final task.

Lumina launches at $149. Be among the first to experience effortless, eye-friendly lighting.

Shop Lumina →

—The Lumina Team

---
Email 2: Benefits/Proof
Subject: Your desk lamp should think ahead

Hi there,

Most desk lamps are static. Your workday isn’t.

Lumina tracks your schedule and environment to deliver the right light at the right time—warm and calm in the morning, clear and bright during deep work, soft and easy in the evening. It’s designed to reduce eye strain and keep you in the zone.

Here’s what Lumina does for you:
• Adapts to time of day automatically
• Syncs with your calendar for focus-friendly lighting during meetings
• Responds to ambient light so your desk always feels balanced

No complicated setup. No constant tweaks. It just works.

See Lumina in action →

—The Lumina Team

---
Email 3: Launch/CTA
Subject: Lumina is live—upgrade your workspace today

Hi there,

Lumina is officially available.

If you’re ready to upgrade your workspace with light that adapts to your life, now’s the time. At $149, Lumina delivers premium smart lighting without the premium hassle.

Make your desk a place you actually want to work.

Get Lumina →

—The Lumina Team

Twitter/X
1) Your desk lamp should know your schedule. Lumina adapts to time of day, calendar events, and room lighting—so you can focus without fiddling. Launch price: $149. #remotework #productivity

2) Morning glow. Midday clarity. Evening ease. Lumina gives you the right light automatically. It just works. ✨

Instagram
1) Caption: Meet Lumina—light that syncs with your workday.

From warm mornings to crisp midday focus and soft evening glow, Lumina adjusts color temperature and brightness automatically based on time, calendar, and ambient light. Designed for remote workers. $149.

#homeoffice #remotework #lightingdesign #productivity

2) Caption: Your workspace, upgraded.

No more harsh glare or manual settings. Lumina adapts to you so your eyes stay comfortable and your focus stays sharp.

#desksetup #workfromhome #smartlighting

LinkedIn
1) Remote work deserves better lighting. Lumina is a smart desk lamp that adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient light—helping reduce eye strain and keep teams focused. Now available for $149.

2) Introducing Lumina: designed for how people actually work. Automatic, adaptive lighting that matches your schedule and environment so you can stay in rhythm all day. Learn more and upgrade your workspace.

Hero
Headline: Light that adapts to your workday
Subhead: Lumina is the smart desk lamp that automatically tunes color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting.
Primary CTA: Get Lumina for $149
Secondary CTA: See how it works

Features
1) Automatic by design
Lumina adjusts light throughout the day so you don’t have to—warm in the morning, clear at midday, soft at night.

2) Calendar-aware focus
Sync your calendar and Lumina shifts to focus-friendly lighting during meetings and deep work blocks.

3) Ambient light sensing
Built-in sensors balance your desk lighting with the room so it always feels comfortable.

4) Eye-friendly performance
Reduce glare and eye strain with smooth transitions and carefully tuned color temperature.

5) Simple setup
Plug in, connect once, and let it run. Lumina just works.

Testimonials (Placeholder)
“Lumina changed the way my workday feels.” — Customer Name
“I didn’t realize how much lighting affected my focus.” — Customer Name
“Set it once and forget it—exactly what I needed.” — Customer Name

FAQ
1) How does Lumina know when to change the light?
Lumina uses time-of-day presets, your calendar, and ambient light sensors to automatically adjust brightness and color temperature.

2) Do I need to keep an app open?
No. After setup, Lumina runs automatically in the background.

3) Can I override the settings manually?
Yes. You can manually set your preferred lighting at any time.

4) Does Lumina work in small or large rooms?
Yes. The ambient light sensor helps Lumina balance to your specific space.

5) What’s included in the box?
Lumina lamp, power adapter, quick start guide.

6) What is the price and availability?
Lumina is available now for $149.

CTA
Upgrade your workspace with light that works with you.
Get Lumina for $149

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Headline: Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to the Remote Workday

Dateline: SAN FRANCISCO, CA — [Month Day, 2024]

Body:
Lumina today announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp designed specifically for remote workers. The $149 lamp automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting to support focus and reduce eye strain.

“Remote work has changed how we spend our days at the desk, but most lighting hasn’t kept up,” said [Spokesperson Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We built Lumina to feel effortless—light that adapts to you so you can stay comfortable and productive.”

Unlike traditional desk lamps that require constant manual adjustments, Lumina uses smart sensing and scheduling to deliver warm light in the morning, crisp illumination during peak focus hours, and softer tones in the evening. The result is a workspace that feels more natural and more in sync with how people actually work.

Lumina is available now for $149 at [website].

About Lumina
Lumina creates intelligent lighting designed for modern work. Built for remote professionals, Lumina products blend thoughtful design with effortless automation to improve comfort, focus, and well-being throughout the day.

Media Contact:
[Name]
[Title]
[Email]
[Phone]
[Website]

steps.text: All files created in the project directory as requested.
